eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 04:08 PM ON MAR 4, 2026 Effective until 12:08 AM MAR 5, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Pinal County. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Maricopa Police Department is looking for 79 year old Vincent Baker last seen on 03/01/2026 driving a 2011, black, Honda Pilot, Arizona License  JFA9B5. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
